bridge_strategy: start from verifiedswap22_bit33eq2, keep the stronger bit-heavy corrective block, then reintroduce the easiest real-CoT numeric_2x2 anchors from stage2 while trimming the easiest gravity/unit stabilizers

selection_criteria.added: Choose stage2 Equation Transformation rows excluding the single current proxy-miss overlap row, sorted by hard_score, prompt_len_chars, id.
selection_criteria.removed: Choose the easiest Gravitational Constant and Unit Conversion stabilizers still present in bit33eq2, sorted by type, hard_score, prompt_len_chars, id.

notes: This is a bridge between the leading verifiedswap22_bit33eq2 lane and the earlier proxymiss40 real-CoT numeric anchor recipe.
Glyph_len5 remains fully excluded; only real-CoT numeric_2x2 anchors are reintroduced.
The parent bit33eq2 benchmark-row replacement set stays intact; only stabilizer capacity is traded for real-CoT symbol anchors.
